docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,704.84 FILED BY LEWIS, MEGAN AS TO DEFENDANT PENA, ELIZABETH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-29-2013 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 65.00 SERVED JUN-12-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PENA, ELIZABETH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-29-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-29-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEWIS, MEGAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PENA, ELIZABETH $3,694.84 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,804.84 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-29-2013 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PENA, ELIZABETH
